appraisal_events.evidence: « dominant de très haut, par sa naissance et sa fortune »; sa venue attendue avec fièvre par les maîtres de maison; « Mme de Cambremer ... reprenait tout son lustre »; son nom bien orthographié et cité en tête dans le Gaulois.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narration highlights the prestige power of Mme de Cambremer: her presence is ardently desired, immediately enhances the brilliance of the hosts, and receives public consecration in the social press, confirming her high status.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, her social stature is affirmed by the desire to have her, the effect of luster she brings, and the flattering mention in the Gaulois, despite the 'slight diminishment' that some attribute to her when she goes to less qualified neighbors.
